page.title: Notifications
page.subtitle: Configure Slack / Webhook channels and subscriptions

form.subscriptionsHint: Pick the event types, then choose which connections to watch (or enable "All connections"). Saving wires the subscriptions automatically.
form.name: Name
form.applyToAllHint: Notify this channel when any event fires for any connection (including ones added later)
form.connectionsDisabled: "All connections" is on — no per-connection selection needed
form.connectionsEmpty: No connections yet. Add one in the Connections library first.
form.keywordTip: Feishu / DingTalk bots require at least one security mode. Simplest: set "ModelDoctor" as the custom keyword (every message we send is prefixed with [ModelDoctor]). HMAC signing is deferred to V2.
form.webhookTip: Posts ModelDoctor's native JSON to any HTTP endpoint. Good for webhook.site debugging, Zapier / n8n / self-hosted bridge services.

delete.channelDescription: All subscriptions and delivery records for this channel will be cascade-deleted. This cannot be undone.
delete.subscriptionDescription: This subscription will stop firing immediately.
